/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/arm_neon_gui.dir/arm_neon_gui_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/arm_neon_gui.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/arm_neon_gui.dir/src/gui/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/arm_neon_gui.dir/src/scalar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/arm_neon_gui.dir/src/neon.cpp.o CMakeFiles/arm_neon_gui.dir/src/benchmark.cpp.o -o arm_neon_gui  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.13
